overall.description: First-person motorcycle gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, riding through Night City's neon-lit streets at night. The player navigates wet reflective roads through open highways, covered underpasses, and industrial districts with futuristic cyberpunk architecture.

events.description: approaching and entering highway underpass, neon skyscrapers receding from view
slowing down to navigate around vehicle ahead on the road

agents.ego_description: riding motorcycle at high speed on wet highway, approaching an underpass while following traffic

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving ahead in the same lane, brake lights illuminated

entered.detail: tall futuristic towers with blue and red neon lighting visible in the distance
concrete overpass structure spanning the highway ahead
large illuminated advertisement screen on building facade
rain-slicked reflective road surface with lane markings

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet multi-lane highway at night with towering neon-lit skyscrapers visible in the distance. The motorcycle approaches a concrete overpass while following a silver sedan, with street lights lining the road and digital billboards visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered highway underpass with concrete walls

events.description: entering covered underpass, transitioning from neon city lighting to artificial tunnel lighting
approaching tunnel exit, natural night lighting becoming visible ahead

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady speed through the covered underpass, following the vehicle ahead

entered.detail: smooth concrete retaining walls lining both sides of the underpass
illuminated digital advertisement screens mounted on the tunnel walls
linear fluorescent lights mounted on the tunnel ceiling

segments.scene_description: The motorcycle drives through a covered concrete underpass with artificial lighting replacing the neon city glow. Digital billboards line the walls while overhead lights illuminate the wet road, and the tunnel exit becomes visible in the distance.

events.description: exiting the covered underpass into open industrial area with warehouses and neon signage
slowing down significantly while approaching the destination area

agents.ego_description: navigating through industrial streets, reducing speed while approaching a covered structure entrance

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving ahead, maintaining distance from the motorcycle

entered.detail: low-rise warehouse structures with minimal lighting
vertical illuminated signs on building facades
metal security fencing along the left side of the road

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel, the scene opens into an industrial district with warehouses and neon signage. The motorcycle slows while navigating toward a covered parking structure, with street lights and road markings guiding the path through the sparsely trafficked area.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered parking garage or checkpoint terminal

events.description: entering covered parking structure or terminal checkpoint with concrete pillars
transitioning to dimmer artificial lighting within the covered structure

agents.ego_description: slowly driving through the covered parking area, approaching what appears to be a toll booth or exit point

entered.detail: large concrete opening leading into the covered structure
thick support columns lining the sides of the driving lane
solid concrete ceiling with embedded lighting fixtures
checkpoint structure with barriers visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the motorcycle entering a covered parking garage or terminal checkpoint. Concrete pillars line the sides while overhead lights illuminate the path ahead. The vehicle continues slowly toward a toll booth area at the far end of the structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a wide, neon-lit highway into the enclosed confines of an industrial parking terminal. It begins on a wet multi-lane road, trailing a silver sedan toward a concrete overpass beneath the glow of distant skyscrapers and digital billboards. As the motorcycle enters a covered underpass, the open city skyline is replaced by artificial overhead lighting and wall-mounted displays that illuminate the damp pavement. The scene then opens into a sparsely trafficked industrial district filled with warehouses and neon signage before the camera steers toward a covered parking structure. Finally, the environment shifts into a narrow corridor of concrete pillars and overhead lights as the vehicle slows toward a toll booth at the far end of the facility.
